title: Keyboard Shortcuts
bodyHtml:
If you're on a computer, these keyboard shortcuts can speed things up:

ShortcutWhat it does
1 / 2 / 3Focus app pane 1, 2, or 3
nCreate a new item in the focused app

These shortcuts only work when you're in the locker and not typing in a text field.
description: Desktop keyboard shortcuts for navigating and using your locker faster.
